subject: [PATCH v2 13/21] nfsd: use test_and_clear_bit for somebody_reclaimed to prevent lost update

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch fixes a problem in the NFS daemon where a concurrent update could be lost due to a race condition between testing and clearing a flag. The patch replaces separate test_bit() and clear_bit() calls with a single atomic test_and_clear_bit() operation, ensuring that updates are not lost.
